title: Player Persistence Record
description: The durable per-CHARACTER save record: identity, position, WEG D6 sheet, org membership, city role, and the hooks the world sim reads/writes (cooldowns, influence-credit). This is what the server loads on login and snapshots on save/logout (M1.4 persistence backbone). Account-level data (login, owned character list) is referenced by account_id and lives in a separate account table; see PERSISTENCE_DESIGN. The live in-memory shape is world_state.gd's player dict + the D6 sheet; this is its persisted superset.

source.source_policy: Design schema for the standalone Godot server's persistence backbone. WEG R&E leads the sheet shape; SW_MUSH supplies org/city role models. Position fields match world_state.gd's authoritative units. Owner-deferred items (Force/Jedi access, death/loot penalty, CP pace) are represented as data fields but their RULES are NOT decided here - see PERSISTENCE_DESIGN open questions.

account_id.description: Owning account. One account may own multiple characters. Account auth WILL live in a separate accounts table; until then the bound secret is stored here as a salted hash (secret_salt/secret_hash, G8; pre-G8 records used plaintext account_secret).

zone.description: Live CURRENT zone (last-traveled). Updated by submit_change_zone and restored on login (DIV-0014); position.zone_id remains the chargen/default spawn zone. Distinct from position.zone_id until the planned accounts/zone refactor unifies them.

account_secret.description: DEPRECATED (pre-G8 plaintext). Legacy records may still carry the bound account secret in plaintext; the current server NEVER writes this field — on the first successful login it is verified once, then migrated in place to the salted-hash pair (secret_salt/secret_hash) and erased. Kept in the schema only so pre-migration legacy records still validate.

secret_salt.description: G8 salted-hash-at-rest: per-account random salt (lowercase hex) drawn by the server's Crypto CSPRNG on first claim. Paired with secret_hash; replaces the plaintext account_secret. Properly belongs in the accounts table (see PERSISTENCE_DESIGN); stored on the character record until that table exists.

secret_hash.description: G8 salted-hash-at-rest: lowercase-hex SHA-256(secret_salt + account secret), checked on re-auth by recompute-and-compare. Never the plaintext secret. Set on first claim of a non-empty secret and on the one-time legacy-plaintext migration.

position.description: Last authoritative position. Server owns truth (world_state.gd never trusts client position). On login the server spawns the character here (or at a safe fallback if the zone is unavailable).

zone_id.description: The chargen/default SPAWN zone (written once at default_record; not kept current as the character travels — the live zone is the top-level `zone` field).

pos.description: World coordinates in the same units as world_state.gd (GROUND_Y=1.2, settlement bounds +/-58).

sheet.description: WEG D6 R&E character sheet. Dice codes are strings like '4D+1'. D6Rules autoload owns dice math; this is the persisted data only.

attributes.description: Six WEG attributes as dice codes.

skills.description: Skill code by skill key. Dice codes.

character_points.description: CP. Earned and spent on advancement. The CP PROGRESSION PACE is an OPEN OWNER DECISION (see PERSISTENCE_DESIGN) - this field stores the value but does not bake a rate.

force_sensitive.description: Whether the character has Force access. Force/Jedi SCARCITY and access rules are an OPEN OWNER DECISION - this flag is the data hook, not the policy.

wound_state.description: WEG wound ladder. Death/loot PENALTY consequences are DECIDED (DIV-0006, Wave F): reaching 'dead' applies death_penalty_model (durability loss + partial drop + insurance, credits kept) and respawns 'wounded'. This field stores the state; the penalty lives in death_penalty_model.

credits.description: Credits. WEG-anchored economy (DIV-0018): a fresh character starts with EconomyModel.STARTING_CREDITS = 1000.

equipment.description: Equipped items by slot (slot -> catalog item key). E22 equip path.

inventory.description: Owned item keys (equip-swap candidates + purchases). Written by chargen + E22 equip + the Wave F buy/sell economy.

force_skills.description: Off-by-default Force skill hook (control/sense/alter as dice codes, 0D until awakened). See force_skills_model + DIV-0011.

force_unlock.description: SWG-Village Force-awakening track (DIV-0011): a hidden multi-phase earned unlock. phase 0=dormant..5=complete; signals are the deterministic in-play accruals that drive it. On completion force_awakening_model flips force_sensitive. Seeded dormant at chargen.

item_durability.description: Per-equipment-slot durability 0..100 (default 100 = pristine when absent). Reduced on death (DIV-0006); at 0 the item is 'broken' (halved pools until repaired).

insurance.description: Death insurance (DIV-0006). Each charge converts a death to no-drop + reduced durability loss; bought for 500cr / 3 charges.

org.description: Faction/guild membership (Guide_10). One faction at a time; up to three guilds. Drives stipends, territory presence/influence credit, and city citizenship.

faction_axis.description: Maps the character's faction to a Director influence axis for narrative bridging.

faction_switch_cooldown_unix.description: Epoch seconds until the 7-day faction-switch cooldown expires.

city_role.description: Player-city relationship (Guide_12), if any. Exactly one role per city the character relates to; the load-bearing one is the character's own org city. Drives the citizen security upgrade, +city home teleport cooldown, and citizen-only access.

home_teleport_cooldown_unix.description: Epoch seconds until +city home is available again (60-min cooldown, persists across logout).

banished_until_unix.description: If banished, epoch seconds the banishment lifts (default 30 days).

world_hooks.description: Transient-but-persisted hooks the world sim reads/writes per character. Kept on the save so cooldowns and pending credit survive restart.

pending_zone_influence.description: Uncommitted faction-influence deltas this character generated (kills, missions, PvP) that the next Director recompute will fold into faction_zone_state. Cleared after commit. Lets influence survive a crash between action and recompute.

active_bounty.description: Whether the character currently has a bounty (reduces PvP protection in contested zones; bounty IS the consent for a guild hunter).

lawless_warning_ack_session.description: Whether the one-time-per-session lawless-entry warning was acknowledged. Session-scoped; reset on login.

corpse.description: The character's dropped-loot corpse from their last death (DIV-0006), null when none. Items decay by zone security tier (secured=none, contested=2h, lawless=4h).

last_saved_unix.description: Epoch seconds of last save snapshot. Server saves on logout and on a periodic autosave tick.
